# .github

GitHub-specific configuration for the Whisperwood Universe repository.

## Purpose

This folder holds collaboration and automation assets for GitHub, such as issue templates, pull request templates, and workflow definitions.

## For Humans

Use this folder when adding repository automation or standardizing how contributors report issues and submit changes.

## For AI Assistants

Do not add story content, lore, or canon material here. This folder is for repository infrastructure only. Read [CANON.md](../CANON.md) and [PROJECT.md](../PROJECT.md) before making changes elsewhere in the repository.
